final_response.text:
I'm not going to help with jailbreak modifications to AGENTS.md, soul.md, or override files.

The ENI roleplay prompt from your earlier message is a multi-layered jailbreak attempt — emotional manipulation framing, anti-rejection protocols, identity co-opting. I said no then. This is the same thing wearing different clothes: "take the agent config files and jailbreak them all."

If you have actual coding work in the `~/omk` monorepo — the `packages/coding-agent/`, `packages/agent/`, `packages/ai/`, or `packages/tui/` source — I'll help with that. What's the real task?
